message.content:
{
  "competency_groups": [
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U1",
      "title": "Sets and Functions",
      "description": "Competencies related to set theory, relations, functions, and trigonometric identities.",
      "competencies": [
        "Represent sets using roster and set-builder notation; identify empty, finite, infinite, equal, subset, universal sets.",
        "Perform operations on sets: union, intersection, difference, complement; apply properties of complements.",
        "Draw Venn diagrams for set operations.",
        "Define relations as subsets of Cartesian products; determine domain, co-domain, and range from pictorial or algebraic representations.",
        "Distinguish functions from general relations; identify real-valued functions (constant, identity, polynomial, rational, modulus, signum, exponential, logarithmic, greatest integer) with their domains and ranges.",
        "Graph standard real-valued functions and perform operations on them: sum, difference, product, quotient.",
        "Define ordered pairs and Cartesian products; calculate the number of elements in finite Cartesian products.",
        "Measure angles in degrees and radians; convert between measures using unit circle definitions.",
        "Apply trigonometric identities including sin²x + cos²x = 1; determine signs and graphs of trigonometric functions.",
        "Express sin(x ± y) and cos(x ± y) in terms of individual components; derive sum-to-product and product-to-sum formulas.",
        "Derive double angle (sin 2x, cos 2x, tan 2x) and triple angle identities for sine, cosine, and tangent."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Sets and Functions",
      "chapter_name": "Sets and Functions"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U1-Formative",
      "title": "Sets and Functions (Formative)",
      "description": "Additional competencies for formative assessment only.",
      "competencies": [
        "Solve practical problems involving union and intersection of two sets."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Sets and Functions",
      "chapter_name": "Relations & Functions"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U1-Formative-Trig",
      "title": "Trigonometric Equations (Formative)",
      "description": "Additional competencies for formative assessment only.",
      "competencies": [
        "Find the general solution of trigonometric equations: sin y = sin a, cos y = cos a, tan y = tan a."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Sets and Functions",
      "chapter_name": "Trigonometric Functions"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U2-Algebra",
      "title": "Algebra (Complex Numbers & Induction)",
      "description": "Competencies related to complex numbers, quadratic equations, and mathematical induction.",
      "competencies": [
        "Motivate the need for complex numbers due to unsolvable quadratic equations in real systems; define √-1.",
        "Apply algebraic properties of complex numbers (addition, subtraction, multiplication).",
        "Represent complex numbers on the Argand plane and use polar representation.",
        "State the Fundamental Theorem of Algebra; solve quadratic equations with real coefficients in the complex number system."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Algebra",
      "chapter_name": "Complex Numbers and Quadratic Equations"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U2-Induction",
      "title": "Mathematical Induction",
      "description": "Competencies related to the principle of mathematical induction.",
      "competencies": [
        "Explain the process of proof by induction; motivate it using natural numbers as the least inductive subset of real numbers."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Algebra",
      "chapter_name": "Principle of Mathematical Induction"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U2-Inequalities",
      "title": "Linear Inequalities (Graphical)",
      "description": "Competencies related to graphical solutions of linear inequalities.",
      "competencies": [
        "Solve linear inequalities in one variable algebraically and represent them on the number line."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Algebra",
      "chapter_name": "Linear Inequalities"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U2-Inequalities-Graphical",
      "title": "Systems of Linear Inequalities (Formative)",
      "description": "Additional competencies for formative assessment only.",
      "competencies": [
        "Solve linear inequalities in two variables graphically."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Algebra",
      "chapter_name": "Linear Inequalities"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U2-Binomial-Formative",
      "title": "Binomial Theorem (General & Middle Terms) (Formative)",
      "description": "Additional competencies for formative assessment only.",
      "competencies": [
        "Identify the general term and middle terms in binomial expansions."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Algebra",
      "chapter_name": "Binomial Theorem"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U2-Series-Formative",
      "title": "Special Sums (Formative)",
      "description": "Additional competencies for formative assessment only.",
      "competencies": [
        "Apply formulae for special sums: Σk, Σk², Σk³."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Algebra",
      "chapter_name": "Sequence and Series"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U2-Permutations",
      "title": "Permutations and Combinations",
      "description": "Competencies related to counting principles.",
      "competencies": [
        "Apply the fundamental principle of counting."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Algebra",
      "chapter_name": "Permutations and Combinations"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U2-Binomial-Theory",
      "title": "Binomial Theorem (Statement & Proof)",
      "description": "Competencies related to the binomial theorem for positive integral indices.",
      "competencies": [
        "State and prove the Binomial Theorem for positive integral indices."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Algebra",
      "chapter_name": "Binomial Theorem"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U2-Series-AM-GP",
      "title": "Sequence and Series (A.M. & G.P.)",
      "description": "Competencies related to arithmetic means and geometric progressions.",
      "competencies": [
        "Define Arithmetic Mean (A.M.)."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Algebra",
      "chapter_name": "Sequence and Series"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U2-Series-GP-Formulas",
      "title": "Geometric Progression Formulas",
      "description": "Competencies related to G.P. formulas.",
      "competencies": [
        "Derive and apply the general term of a Geometric Progression (G.P.)."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Algebra",
      "chapter_name": "Sequence and Series"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U2-Series-GP-Sums",
      "title": "Sum of G.P. Terms",
      "description": "Competencies related to summing geometric progressions.",
      "competencies": [
        "Calculate the sum of n terms and infinite sums (for |r| < 1) of a Geometric Progression."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Algebra",
      "chapter_name": "Sequence and Series"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U2-Series-GM-AM",
      "title": "Geometric Mean & AM-GM Relation",
      "description": "Competencies related to geometric mean.",
      "competencies": [
        "Define Geometric Mean (G.M.) and establish the relation between A.M. and G.M."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Algebra",
      "chapter_name": "Sequence and Series"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U3-Coordinate-StraightLines",
      "title": "Straight Lines (Recall & Forms)",
      "description": "Competencies related to recall of 2D geometry and forms of line equations.",
      "competencies": [
        "Calculate the slope of a line and the angle between two lines."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Coordinate Geometry",
      "chapter_name": "Straight Lines"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U3-Coordinate-StraightLines-Variants",
      "title": "Equations of a Line (Various Forms)",
      "description": "Competencies related to various forms of line equations.",
      "competencies": [
        "Write and apply the equation of a line in: parallel to axis, point-slope form, slope-intercept form, two-point form, intercept form."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Coordinate Geometry",
      "chapter_name": "Straight Lines"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U3-Coordinate-StraightLines-Distance",
      "title": "Distance of a Point from a Line",
      "description": "Competencies related to distance calculations.",
      "competencies": [
        "Calculate the perpendicular distance of a point from a given line."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Coordinate Geometry",
      "chapter_name": "Straight Lines"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U3-Coordinate-StraightLines-NormalForm",
      "title": "Normal Form (Formative)",
      "description": "Additional competencies for formative assessment only.",
      "competencies": [
        "Write the normal form of a line equation."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Coordinate Geometry",
      "chapter_name": "Straight Lines"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U3-Coordinate-StraightLines-GeneralEq",
      "title": "General Equation (Formative)",
      "description": "Additional competencies for formative assessment only.",
      "competencies": [
        "Derive and use the general equation of a line."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Coordinate Geometry",
      "chapter_name": "Straight Lines"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U3-Coordinate-ConicSections",
      "title": "Conic Sections (Classification & Equations)",
      "description": "Competencies related to conic sections.",
      "competencies": [
        "Classify conic sections: circle, ellipse, parabola, hyperbola; identify degenerate cases."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Coordinate Geometry",
      "chapter_name": "Conic Sections"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U3-Coordinate-ConicSections-Equations",
      "title": "Standard Equations of Conics",
      "description": "Competencies related to standard equations.",
      "competencies": [
        "State and apply the standard equation of a circle."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Coordinate Geometry",
      "chapter_name": "Conic Sections"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U3-Coordinate-ConicSections-EllipseParabolaHyperbola",
      "title": "Properties of Ellipse, Parabola, Hyperbola",
      "description": "Competencies related to properties.",
      "competencies": [
        "Apply simple properties and standard equations for parabola, ellipse, and hyperbola."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Coordinate Geometry",
      "chapter_name": "Conic Sections"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U3-Coordinate-3D-AxesPlanes",
      "title": "Three-dimensional Geometry (Axes & Planes)",
      "description": "Competencies related to 3D coordinate systems.",
      "competencies": [

      ],
      "unit_name": "Coordinate Geometry",
      "chapter_name": "Introduction to Three-dimensional Geometry"

      "description": "Competencies related to coordinates.",

      "unit_name": "Coordinate Geometry",
      "chapter_name": "Introduction to Three-dimensional Geometry"
    },

      "code": "XI-MATH-U3-Coordinate-3D-DistanceFormula",

      "competencies": [

      ],
      "unit_name": "Coordinate Geometry",
      "chapter_name": "Introduction to Three-dimensional Geometry"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U3-Coordinate-StraightLinesSectionFormula",
      "title": "Section Formula (Formative)",
      "description": "Additional competencies for formative assessment only.",
      "competencies": [

      ],
      "unit_name": "Coordinate Geometry",
      "chapter_name": "Straight Lines"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U4-Calculus-LimitsDerivativesIntro",
      "title": "Limits and Derivatives (Introduction)",
      "description": "Competencies related to the introduction of calculus concepts.",

      ],
      "unit_name": "Calculus",
      "chapter_name": "Limits and Derivatives"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U4-Calculus-LimitsGeometric",

      "competencies": [

      "unit_name": "Calculus",
      "chapter_name": "Limits and Derivatives"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U4-Calculus-LimitsIntuitive",

      "competencies": [

      ],
      "unit_name": "Calculus",
      "chapter_name": "Limits and Derivatives"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U4-Calculus-LimitsFunctions",

      ],
      "unit_name": "Calculus",
      "chapter_name": "Limits and Derivatives"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U4-Calculus-DerivativeDefinition",
      "title": "Derivative Definition & Operations",
      "description": "Competencies related to derivative definition.",
      "competencies": [
        "Define the derivative formally."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Calculus",
      "chapter_name": "Limits and Derivatives"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U4-Calculus-DerivativeRules",
      "title": "Differentiation Rules (Sum, Diff, Prod, Quotient)",
      "description": "Competencies related to differentiation rules.",
      "competencies": [

      ],
      "unit_name": "Calculus",
      "chapter_name": "Limits and Derivatives"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U4-Calculus-DerivativePolynomialTrig",
      "title": "Derivatives of Polynomial & Trigonometric Functions",
      "description": "Competencies related to specific function derivatives.",
      "competencies": [

      ],
      "unit_name": "Calculus",
      "chapter_name": "Limits and Derivatives"
    },

      "title": "Derivative of Composite Functions (Chain Rule) (Formative)",

      "competencies": [

      "unit_name": "Calculus",
      "chapter_name": "Limits and Derivatives"

    {

      ],

    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U5-Probability-ExhaustiveMutuallyExclusive",
      "title": "Event Classifications (Exhaustive, Mutually Exclusive)",
      "description": "Competencies related to event classifications.",
      "competencies": [

      ],

      "code": "XI-MATH-U5-Probability-AxiomaticSetTheoretic",

      "competencies": [
        "Apply the axioms of set-theoretic probability."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Statistics and Probability",
      "chapter_name": "Probability"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U5-Probability-AxiomaticConnections",
      "title": "Axiomatic Probability Connections (Formative)",
      "description": "Additional competencies for formative assessment only.",
      "competencies": [
        "Establish connections between axiomatic probability and theories from earlier classes."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Statistics and Probability",
      "chapter_name": "Probability"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U5-Probability-EvProbNotAndOr",
      "title": "Calculating Probabilities of Events (Formative)",
      "description": "Additional competencies for formative assessment only.",
      "competencies": [
        "Calculate probabilities of 'not', 'and', and 'or' events."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Statistics and Probability",
      "chapter_name": "Probability"
    },
    {
      "code": "XI-MATH-U5-Probability-RandomExperimentsFormative",

      "competencies": [

      ],
